phase_0.boundary_condition: The Outer Veil that encloses the All within the ineffable and unutterable Father

VINIT.justification: The initial void and silence before any emanation or naming, the first source of the All.

TANCH.justification: The terminal boundary that encloses the entire pleromatic system, preventing the unassailable deep from spilling into the non-existent.

AFWD.justification: The forward morphism of the Father casting forth rays and generating the Second Place and the aeons.

AREV.justification: The reverse transformation where the light-spark penetrates down to the formless matter below.

CLINK.justification: The sequential chaining of the twelve deeps and the myriads of aeons born in joy.

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-reference and mirror of the All, where the Father contemplates himself and generates the self-begotten place.

FSPLIT.chosen_element: The Separation of Existent and Non-Existent
FSPLIT.justification: The branching of the unified Pleroma into the Land of Life and the Land of Death.

FFUSE.justification: The reconstitution of the separated members back into the unified Pleroma through the creative Word.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state where the right side receives the light-spark and is granted eternal life and rest.

EVALF.justification: The negative state where the left side is deprived of light, becoming matter and toil.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice of the Only-Begotten One, held simultaneously as excess light and perceived darkness by the lower aeons.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, irreversible fixation of the eternal crowns and ordinances upon the receivers.

phase_2.split_element: The Separation of Existent and Non-Existent

phase_3.void_description: The silence of the Ineffable Father, the unassailable deep before any emanation or character.
phase_3.true_description: The Land of Life, where the light-spark is received, aeons are established, and eternal rest is granted.
phase_3.false_description: The Land of Death, the agitation of matter, and the non-existent realm of toil and darkness.
phase_3.both_description: The Light-Darkness, the paradox of the Only-Begotten One who is excess light becoming darkness to those below.

steps.domain_action: The Ineffable Father exists in silence, the unassailable deep before any emanation.
The Father contemplates himself, generating the self-begotten place and the Mirror of the All.
The First Father emanates the Second Place, the Demiurge and Logos, casting forth rays.
The succession of the twelve deeps and the myriads of aeons born in joy.
The Pleroma is agitated by the light-spark, separating the existent from the non-existent.
The right side receives the light-spark, becoming the Land of Life and Rest.
The aeons of the right side are established in their ranks and ordinances.
The left side is deprived of light, becoming the Land of Death and Matter.
The descent of the light-spark through the veils into the formless matter below.
The creative Word gathers the dispersed, uniting the members and reconstituting the Pleroma.
The Only-Begotten One manifests as Light-Darkness, held simultaneously as excess light and perceived darkness.
The Seal of the Father is permanently fixed upon the receivers, establishing the eternal ordinance and crowns.
The Outer Veil closes the system, bounding the All within the ineffable and unutterable Father.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Forethought that inspires those without existence and commands the All to work.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The Word and the light of the eyes penetrating above and below to transmit gnosis.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The twelve deeps and the rational sources filled with eternal life and gnosis.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Will of the First Father and the hidden ordinance of the aeons.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Ineffable Father, the first source and the deep of the All.

phase_6.cycle_cost: The agitation of the Pleroma and the consumption of light-sparks in descent.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The unified, silent Pleroma resting in the Ineffable Father.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The established aeons, crowned and ranked, with matter separated and purified.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The emanation and return of the light-spark conserve the total pleromatic fullness, merely redistributing glory without loss.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → AFWD → CLINK → FSPLIT → EVALT → AFWD → EVALF → AREV → FFUSE → ENGAGR → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: ob3ect_sequence
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 9)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑱  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑾 → 𐑚  | composition — regime coherence
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [7] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [8] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [9] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [10] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑭  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑳 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [12] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The Ineffable Father exists in silence, the unassailable deep before any eman...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The Father contemplates himself, generating the self-begotten place and the M...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑱)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The First Father emanates the Second Place, the Demiurge and Logos, casting f...)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑾 𐑚)  -- [3] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The succession of the twelve deeps and the myriads of aeons born in joy.)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (The Pleroma is agitated by the light-spark, separating the existent from the non-existent.) / FFUSE [9] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The right side receives the light-spark, becoming the Land of Life and Rest.)
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The aeons of the right side are established in their ranks and ordinances.)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The left side is deprived of light, becoming the Land of Death and Matter.)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The descent of the light-spark through the veils into the formless matter below.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [9]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [9] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The creative Word gathers the dispersed, uniting the members and reconstituting the Pleroma.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [10] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The Only-Begotten One manifests as Light-Darkness, held simultaneously as exc...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The Seal of the Father is permanently fixed upon the receivers, establishing ...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The Outer Veil closes the system, bounding the All within the ineffable and u...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (ob3ect_sequence_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (ob3ect_sequence_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem ob3ect_sequence_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
